overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through rural countryside at dusk. The scene features overcast skies, cool blue-green lighting, and transitions from dense vegetation to a view of a distant village with wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt trail through overgrown countryside

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords on his back, moving through dense vegetation flanked by stone walls

entered.detail: winding dirt trail extending into the distance
low stone wall ruins running parallel to the path
tall grass and bushes lining the right side of the trail
sparse trees visible in the background
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail flanked by dense vegetation and old stone wall ruins. The path winds through overgrown countryside with scattered trees visible in the distance under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail with birch trees and stone walls

events.description: birch trees with white bark become prominent on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the path, passing birch trees on the right while the stone wall remains on the left

entered.detail: tall birch trees with distinctive white bark and green foliage
simple wooden posts beginning to line the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues past prominent birch trees on the right side while the stone wall remains on the left. Wooden fence posts begin to appear as the landscape opens slightly, revealing more of the surrounding grassy clearings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail approaching a village with wooden fences

events.description: distant village buildings with thatched roofs become visible ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the distant village, with wooden fences now lining the left side of the path

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running along the left side of the trail
cluster of medieval-style wooden buildings with thatched roofs
small hut with a steep thatched roof visible to the left of the path
warm orange light glowing among the distant village buildings

segments.scene_description: Approaching a rural village, wooden fences line the left side of the path while thatched-roof buildings become visible in the distance ahead. The trail widens as it leads toward the settlement, with a warm campfire glow visible among the houses against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from a secluded, overgrown path into the outskirts of a cozy village at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking between dense vegetation and crumbling stone wall ruins under a heavy, overcast sky. As the path winds forward, the landscape opens slightly to reveal prominent birch trees and the first appearance of wooden fence posts amidst grassy clearings. The scene then shifts toward a settlement as the trail widens and thatched-roof buildings emerge in the distance. Finally, the camera approaches the village, where the cool blue-green light of evening is punctuated by the warm glow of campfires flickering among the houses.
